tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
    edit "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "LAN_SUBNET"
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
end
config firewall addrgrp
    edit "UBUNTU_ALLOWED_OUT"
        set member "LAN_SUBNET"
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "UBUNTU_ALLOW_LAN"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set dstaddr "LAN_SUBNET"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat disable
    next
    edit 0
        set name "UBUNTU_ALLOW_INTERNET"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS" "DNS" "PING"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 0
        set name "UBUNTU_DENY_OTHER_OUT"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     edit "UBUNTU_HOST"
new entry 'UBUNTU_HOST' added

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "UBUNTU_ALLOW_LAN"
        set uuid 19ed20ba-29cf-51f1-b458-95231f342a5e
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set dstaddr "LAN_SUBNET"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
    next
edit 3
        set name "UBUNTU_ALLOW_INTERNET"
        set uuid 1a17ff9c-29cf-51f1-1f30-c78a3d60243c
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS" "DNS" "PING"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 4
        set name "UBUNTU_DENY_OTHER_OUT"
        set uuid 1a40e2e0-29cf-51f1-acb8-318b22eae11b
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
end
